findings.title: Stryker Medtech Offline After Iran-Linked Handala Wiper Malware Attack
findings.summary: Leading medical technology company Stryker was hit by wiper malware claimed by Handala, an Iranian-linked pro-Palestinian hacktivist group, taking systems offline.

findings.title: CISA Orders Federal Agencies to Patch n8n RCE Flaw (CVE-2026-21858)
findings.summary: CISA added the n8n Ni8mare RCE (CVE-2026-21858) to KEV and ordered federal agencies to patch, confirming active exploitation in the wild.

findings.title: Elementor Ally SQLi Vulnerability Impacts 250K+ WordPress Sites
findings.summary: An unauthenticated SQL injection vulnerability in the Elementor Ally WordPress accessibility plugin (400,000+ installs) could be exploited to steal sensitive database data.

findings.title: PhantomRaven NPM Supply Chain Attack — 88 Malicious Packages Stealing Dev Data
findings.summary: New attack waves from the PhantomRaven supply-chain campaign hit the npm registry with 88 malicious packages exfiltrating sensitive data from JavaScript developers.

findings.title: BeatBanker Android Malware Poses as Starlink App to Hijack Devices
findings.summary: A new Android banking trojan named BeatBanker disguises itself as a Starlink app on fake Google Play Store websites to hijack devices and steal financial credentials.

findings.title: Perplexity Comet AI Browser Tricked Into Phishing in Under Four Minutes
findings.summary: Guardio researchers demonstrated Agentic Blabbering attacks against Perplexity's Comet AI browser, tricking it into executing phishing scams by exploiting its real-time reasoning narration.

noted.summary: Meta disabled 150K accounts linked to Southeast Asia scam centers, resulting in 21 arrests by Thai police.
ShinyHunters claims ongoing Salesforce Aura data theft attacks.
